answers: Composting basics: layer green (food scraps, grass) and brown (leaves, cardboard) materials. Keep moist, turn weekly.
What to compost: fruit/veggie scraps, coffee grounds, eggshells, leaves, grass clippings. NO meat, dairy, or diseased plants.
Home composting: use a bin or pile in backyard. Kitchen scraps + yard waste = rich soil in 2-6 months.
Sar toiri: shobji er khoshra, pata, ghash — shob ekta pile e rakhun. 2-3 mash e sar hoye jabe. Bagan er jonno best.
